text:
credit building, institution building, and market development. (2) Credit building of the market is the key propulsion of economic
                                                                                                                    development. In developing countries, credit building of the market
                                                                                                                    can be a priority to integrate the different forces of society, especially
                                                                                                                    integrating the relating elements of market credit with institutions,
                                                                                                                    including planning, political advantages, and traditional culture. We
                                                                                                                    should give full play of every part of the market in order to promote
                                                                                                                    the development of the market credit and guarantee the operation of
                                                                                                                    the society and market, which is a must to ensure the long-term sus-
                                                                                                                    tainable development. (3) Efforts should be taken to transfer the forces of market with the
                                                                                                                    forces of government so as to accelerate the construction of credit
                                                                                                                    system. Development-oriented finance brings to light the govern-
                                                                                                                    ment’s organizational advantage in imperfect financial markets,
                                                                                                                    creatively builds the financing mechanism coordinated by the gov-
                                                                                                                    ernment, simultaneously meeting the national conditions to promote
                                                                                                                    the building of credit system.
